summary: BREAKTHROUGH! h2_end_stream=0 → DeepSeek EventStream 2 events 파싱 성공! (이전 0 events). GOAWAY가 스트림을 끊어 네트워크 에러 발생하지만 SSE 파싱 자체는 작동.

eventstream_detail.data: {"choices":[{"delta":{"content":"이 서비스는 회..."}} (warning text in OpenAI format)

results.response_body: Nothing to preview (GOAWAY terminates before body capture)
results.console_warnings: WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming MIME type warnings x4 (Etap MITM — unrelated to SSE)

streaming_evidence.response_time_10s: h2_end_stream=0 keeps stream open — browser enters streaming mode
streaming_evidence.eventstream_2_events: FIRST TIME DeepSeek has EventStream events > 0!

root_cause_analysis.h2_end_stream_0_effect: SUCCESS — without END_STREAM flag, browser treats response as streaming and starts incremental SSE parsing. 10.06s response time proves stream was held open.
root_cause_analysis.goaway_conflict: GOAWAY sends connection-level shutdown WHILE the stream is still open (no END_STREAM). Browser interprets this as abnormal termination → fetch() ReadableStream throws network error → frontend shows '네트워크를 확인하고 다시 시도하세요'
root_cause_analysis.events_parsed_before_goaway: 2 events (data + [DONE]) were received and parsed by Chrome BEFORE GOAWAY killed the connection
root_cause_analysis.next_step: Replace GOAWAY with proper stream termination: send DATA with END_STREAM flag AFTER the SSE data. Sequence: HEADERS(no ES) → DATA(SSE body, no ES) → DATA(empty, ES=1). Or use RST_STREAM with NO_ERROR after a delay.

services.verdict: MAJOR_BREAKTHROUGH — SSE parsing works, needs proper stream termination

overall_verdict: MAJOR_BREAKTHROUGH — h2_end_stream=0 enables SSE streaming. EventStream 2 events parsed (FIRST TIME for DeepSeek). GOAWAY causes network error but SSE parsing itself works.
key_findings: h2_end_stream=0 is THE key to SSE streaming — browser enters streaming mode and parses events incrementally
DeepSeek EventStream: 2 events (data + [DONE]) — previously ALWAYS 0 events with END_STREAM=1
Response time 10.06s (vs 190ms) confirms streaming mode — browser waited for stream to complete
GOAWAY successfully prevents ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR but conflicts with open stream
Warning text is in correct OpenAI choices/delta/content format
No red JS errors in Console — only WebAssembly MIME warnings (unrelated)
recommendation: Remove GOAWAY. Instead: HEADERS(200, no END_STREAM) → DATA(SSE body, no END_STREAM) → small delay → DATA(empty, END_STREAM=1). This properly terminates the H2 stream without connection-level disruption. The browser will finish processing the stream normally.

progress_summary.phase_2_end_stream_0_goaway: EventStream 2 events but network error (#420 — THIS TEST)
